title: Enchantment Lister
description: EnchantmentLister is a simple and lightweight Paper 1.21.5 plugin that lets you list all available enchantments on your server
body:
## EnchantmentLister is a simple and lightweight Paper 1.21.5 plugin that lets you list all available enchantments on your server — including:

- **🧙 Vanilla enchantments**
  
- **📦 Datapack enchantments**
  
- **🔌 Plugin-registered custom enchantments**

### ✨ Features:
- /listenchantments command to list all enchantments.
  
- Shows enchantments in namespace:id format (e.g., minecraft:sharpness, datapackmagic:fire_pulse).
  
- Displays the list to the player and logs it to the console.
  
- Supports datapack and plugin-added enchantments automatically.
  
- Lightweight, no config or setup needed — just drop it in!

- **📋 Command:**
  
  - Command	Permission	Description
  - /listenchantments	enchantmentlister.list	Lists all enchantments available on the server.
  - (Default permission is true for all players.)
  
### 🔧 Installation:
- Install Paper 1.21.5 or higher.
  
- Drop the plugin JAR into your /plugins folder.
  
- Restart your server.
  
- Run /listenchantments!
